title: Best Herbal Remedies for Reducing Unwanted Eye Bags
description: Melissa officinalis tea, also known as lemon balm tea, is a popular herbal remedy for eye bags. This is because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling and puffiness around the eyes. When you drink the tea, the anti-inflammatory compounds are absorbed into the bloodstream and then travel to the eyes, where they can help to soothe and calm the skin.
